content:
After noticing a difference between two Liz supports with different Exalt level (one level 1, the other level 6) + my own, I tried testing it myself (rip my 30 Mimetic Crystals) and the Corrupted Flames generated from her Soulforge went up after leveling up her Exalt.

My Exalt is level 2, and the generated Corrupted Flames has a 0.21x multiplier, the same as a level 2 Green Flames, despite my actual Green Flames being level 3.

Is it intended ? If so, shouldn't there be a tooltip somewhere indicating so ?
thread_title: Liz' Corrupted Flames generated from her Soulforge scales with Exalt level ?

content:
看到您就讓我想到我完全提不起勁做任何繁中校對 我太罪惡了
但我對你忘的熱忱真的在消退
昨天寫這一大串純粹是被氣的
貓之前說你忘有很多類型的玩家吧
現在呢
普通沒什麼執著的玩家——被空幻陰了
高難玩家與任意真愛黨——被數值膨脹陰了
常駐廚子——還要額外被300普抽補三圍陰
劇情黨——被吃書陰了
相位對弈玩家——去你媽的每一期都換規則現在貼圖庫存還用完了是吧
欣賞美麗角色的廚子——對角色一直改設計絕望了
同人創作者——被拉去當翻譯志願者不需要再記名的藉口了

全方位辜負所有類型的玩家
了不起
真的了不起

content:
反正不知道這期你貓是在搞什麼
AA搞拉踩
補強再拉一波
5章王各種鎖血鎖好鎖滿也是用來賣新角的
本來已經沒啥可玩了，你遊產能都低到這程度還搞這套是何意味
真是準備把你遊徹底轉型課金糞遊嗎?
半周年全是舊活動
課金內容比活動還多
舊角說用無垢補強一隻300抽補那10%，怎麼不看看你星辰限定補強補了多少，打發叫花子嗎😡 
不想救舊角真是可以直說，這樣搞可以滿足到什麼人，哪邊都不討好
想到什麼做什麼
像當初普朵皮活動一樣，官方dc開了一串互相交換邀請碼當是招到萌新，不然就是開小號自解，相當於這系統是純粹白做的，你們是可以一直掩耳盜鈴，但到頭來有解決到什麼問題嗎😡 😡 😡

content:
Day 2. Dev still remain silent. Lets share this on q-a 

I start playing when clem release i caught the 1.5 anniversary, the drama around it and the subsequent ones.
About character design(hello kath), about raid event, about dupes(how many dupes need), about powercreep(gmurphy), about +12, about skins, about gacha on skins(murphy hello skin), about fomo baners, about paid banner.

And you know what I hear all this time? Sorry, we are so sorry and promise, we don't do this again. I'm sure they do this again xd ( https://tenor.com/view/were-sorry-tony-hayward-south-park-s14e11-coon2rise-of-captain-hindsight-gif-22864475 )

Morimens is great game with great story but dev team do mistakes again, again and again. They try to tell us all the time that "Morimens belongs not only to us but also to you" but it just doesn't work when you're constantly apologizing and breaking promises.

Light is trying to show that he hears us and is ready to communicate. But the last post in <#1426837316533747823>  was about 2 months ago, <#1180845276823564288>  they take a very long time to respond (you'll be lucky if they respond at all)

1. Cancel 300 normal pull for stats

2. Decide how you'll interact with the community. If you want to continue reaching out to players, it might be better to create occasional Q&A posts

3. Give us road map future plans

4. Stop apologize and do something real, not only words 

5. Stop making promises that will eventually be broken anyway
thread_title: ✅「Answered」Another ani, another drama
✅「Answered」Another ani, another drama

Idk if a road map is something that would be useful to use either

content:
<@1487626955791663208> <@&1166257943742787615> 

- why introduce daily banners (unit + wheel combined) when so many players complained back in 2.4 and devs apologised & changed it? 

- why put standard unit upgrade behind a 300 pure core wall? previously limited awakeners received a 10% buff to their stats, is it that difficult to give standard units the same 10% stat buff to minimise the power gap?

- why put ethereal cores inside paid $$ half anniversary pack? isn’t ethereal cores used to combat RMT account sellers and only used in special occasion? how does paying for temporary pulls make sense ? 

- why put a time-gate on anniversary rewards? players will lose out on daily banners or do you only care about players spending more $$$?
thread_title: ✅「Answered」Another ani, another drama

content:
i want to believe in biav and i love morimens

but i do not understand why mistakes keep repeating
thread_title: ✅「Answered」Another ani, another drama

content:
Nah the core part is fine. They even talked about it a while back in Arle interview. But they just overshot the cost for these changes.

They added the 10% buff to limited units back then to incentivize people to use limited units. To make them more juicy.

Ephemeral part.... Yeah I got nothing I agree with you here.
thread_title: ✅「Answered」Another ani, another drama

content:
either way it’s poorly executed 

light said giving dev logs in advance would be mandatory ever since his last apology, which didn’t happen. 

had he done that, he would have received player feedback and could have made better changes, instead of causing the riot we have now 

also, isn’t it the opposite? most standard units aren’t viable in end game content (alert 5 / arc 2 hard mode) and most players use standard units as supports to their limited awakener carries

why does biav need to incentivise people to use limited units when standard units sees less use? 

shouldn’t they be giving the 10% stat buff to incentivise more viable standard teams instead of meta spam with limited units ?
thread_title: ✅「Answered」Another ani, another drama
